decisions.decision: Deploy on Cloudflare (not Vercel/WSL-direct): OpenNext adapter, node-postgres (pg) + pg-cloudflare + Hyperdrive, per-request getDb() via React cache() with maxUses:1, serverExternalPackages for pg
decisions.rationale: Vercel free quota hit; postgres-js hangs on Workers; module-level DB client hangs; Windows OpenNext build broken → build on Cloudflare Linux via Workers Builds

decisions.decision: DATABASE_URL uses Supabase IPv4 session pooler (aws-1-ap-northeast-1, :5432, sslmode=require); Hyperdrive config also has sslmode=require
decisions.rationale: direct db.<ref>.supabase.co host is IPv6-only, unreachable from Windows/Workers

decisions.decision: package-lock.json MUST be generated on Linux/npm10 (committed cfc3760)
decisions.rationale: Windows/npm11 lockfile fails `npm ci` on Cloudflare runners

decisions.decision: Part A: city optional; infer via Claude Haiku from place list (fail-open); buildCityBias returns null for unknown cities and textSearch folds city into query (50km radius cap fix)
decisions.rationale: user wants AI to detect city; non-Taiwan cities broke on 100km bias

decisions.decision: Sub-project C: only 餐廳 gets meal slots (lunch 11:30-13:30 / dinner 17:30-19:30); 點心+行程 are shortest-path route stops; categories auto from place_types
decisions.rationale: user clarified 3-type taxonomy + snack = normal short stop
